name: webmcp-local-relay
description: Relay browser-registered WebMCP tools to any MCP client via localhost WebSocket bridge
long_description: WebMCP Local Relay connects your browser tabs to AI agents like Claude. Websites that register WebMCP tools (via navigator.modelContext) are automatically discovered and relayed through a local WebSocket bridge, making them available as standard MCP tools. Tools are dynamically added and removed as you navigate between pages.

tools.name: webmcp_list_sources
tools.description: List connected browser tool sources and their metadata

tools.name: webmcp_list_tools
tools.description: List relayed tools available from connected browser sources

tools.name: webmcp_call_tool
tools.description: Call a browser-relayed tool by name with JSON arguments

tools.name: webmcp_open_page
tools.description: Open a URL in the default browser, or refresh a connected source by origin

port.title: WebSocket Port
port.description: Local port for the WebSocket bridge that browser tabs connect to

allowed_origins.title: Allowed Origins
allowed_origins.description: Comma-separated list of allowed browser origins, or * to allow all
